title: [FIRRTL] handle zero-width deletion: rwprobe/forceable, force+friends
body:
Consider:

```
circuit Foo:
  module Foo:
    wire x : UInt<0>
    x <= UInt(0)
    force_initial(rwprobe(x), UInt<0>(0))
```

Presently this dies in LowerToHW.  Presently LowerXMR is responsible for examining all ref uses and dropping if zero-width, so bug (I think) is LowerXMR preserving the force operation and keeps declarations forceable.
